nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ea_p.script_id) AS scripts_evaluated, COUNT(DISTINCT ea_c.script_id) AS scripts_coordinated FROM board b JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id JOIN evaluator_pool ep ON ep.board_id = b.id AND ep.eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND ep.is_available = TRUE JOIN evaluation_attempt ea_p ON ea_p.board_id = b.id AND ea_p.evaluator_user_id = fc.employee_erp_id AND ea_p.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND ea_p.is_active = TRUE JOIN evaluation_attempt ea_c ON ea_c.board_id = b.id AND ea_c.evaluator_user_id = fc.employee_erp_id AND ea_c.attempt_type = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' AND ea_c.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY b.id, b.name
